heading: Omitted
label: 1380a to 1380p Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1380a to 1380p of this title were effective only with respect to 1957 and 1958 rice crops.Section 1380a, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , provided legislative findings for this part.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 30, title III, § 380aMay 28, 1956, ch. 32770 Stat. 208Section 1380b, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , related to effective date and termination of program.act Feb. farms.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 30, title III, § 380dMay 28, 1956, ch. 32770 Stat. 209Section 1380e, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , provided that a farm operator to which a primary market quota applied could have such quota reviewed.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 30, title III, § 380eMay 28, 1956, ch. 32770 Stat. 209Section 1380f, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , related to price supports made added , title V, § 501(3), , related to rice processing restrictions.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 30, title III, § 380kMay 28, 1956, ch. 32770 Stat. 210Section 1380, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , 380May 28, 1956, ch. 32770 Stat. 211Section 1380p, , as added , title V, § 501(3), , defined “cooperator”, “processing of rough rice”, “processed rice”, “United States”, “exporter”, “rough rice
